nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.grounding_span: AI makes this task a lot easier and saves me a lot of time

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.label_negative: AI output requiring revision for grade-level fit
nodes.grounding_span: the texts are usually either too easy for the grade level I am requesting content for, or too challenging

nodes.label: AI as search tool for simple queries
nodes.grounding_span: I don't usually have the time to collaborate in that way, and so I usually just need quick results

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: in my workplace, we are often encouraged to use AI to help create content

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for core teaching skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI would just help in situations where I cannot create my own because of a lack of ideas or time

nodes.label: AI ability to tailor activities to mixed developmental levels
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to content creation only
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that in the future, AI can also be used for things like grading student responses and communicating with families

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saves me a lot of time

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I know that a kindergarten student likely wouldn't know the word 'particularly'

nodes.label: Career sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: help make teaching a more manageable and sustainable profession

nodes.label: Teacher professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not worried about losing that skill because it's still something I would do often without AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: I ended up being pretty satisfied with the results, and it really saved me a lot of time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to reconsider grading
nodes.grounding_span: it can be a little frustrating at times if I ask for a change in vocabulary level or overall complexity and the AI just gives a different story that's mostly at the same level as before

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to be able to use AI in other ways in the years ahead

nodes.label: Discretion about AI use due to stigma
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it seems as if teachers are viewed as 'lazy' if they use AI

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through revision requests
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask for revisions to make it more in line with what I need

nodes.label: Domain-specific calibration of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Experience and time in the classroom
